title: Jack Broadbent (rugby league)
extract:
Jack Broadbent (born 1 November 2000) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a centre, stand-off, fullback or winger for Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League.
He has previously played for the Leeds Rhinos and the Castleford Tigers in the Super League. He has spent time on loan from Leeds at Featherstone Rovers and the Batley Bulldogs in the RFL Championship.
